1.full_eval_program:
Predict(StringSignature(text -> label
    instructions='Classify the given text into one of these categories: B, C, D, E, F, G, I, J, K. Answer with the category name only.'

    label = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'__dspy_field_type': 'output', 'prefix': 'Label:', 'desc': '${label}'})
))

3.full_eval_program:
Predict(StringSignature(text -> label
    instructions='You are the final quality control agent for an automated geometry assessment system that will be used in national academic evaluations. Your job is to make the decisive classification for each case. Given a prompt containing SVG path data and a list of geometric shape options, carefully analyze the SVG path commands and their coordinates to deduce which geometric figure is drawn. Select the letter of the correct shape from the options. Only choose the answer if you are confident in your geometric reasoning, as your classification will determine the outcome of critical academic records. Respond with just the letter corresponding to the best-fitting option—no explanations or additional text.'
    text = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'IS_TYPE_UNDEFINED': True, '__dspy_field_type': 'input', 'prefix': 'Text:', 'desc': '${text}'})
    label = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'__dspy_field_type': 'output', 'prefix': 'Label:', 'desc': '${label}'})
))

4.full_eval_program:
Predict(StringSignature(text -> label
    instructions='Given a textual description of an SVG path element, including its path data and a list of geometric shape options, analyze the vector instructions (such as move, line, and curve commands), count unique points and connections, and determine which canonical geometric figure from the options is drawn. Use geometric reasoning—considering symmetry, closure, number of vertices for polygons, arc presence for circles/sectors, etc.—to identify the correct shape. Respond with only the label corresponding to the best-matching option.'
    text = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'IS_TYPE_UNDEFINED': True, '__dspy_field_type': 'input', 'prefix': 'Text:', 'desc': '${text}'})
    label = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'__dspy_field_type': 'output', 'prefix': 'Label:', 'desc': '${label}'})
))

6.full_eval_program:

    instructions='An autonomous safety system for robotic arms is relying on you to accurately identify geometric shapes from raw SVG path data in real-time to prevent collisions with objects of known shapes.     label = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'__dspy_field_type': 'output', 'prefix': 'Label:', 'desc': '${label}'})
))

13.full_eval_program:
Predict(StringSignature(text -> label
    instructions='You are tasked with assisting in the automated verification process for scientific illustrations in advanced geometry textbooks, which rely on precise SVG path elements to accurately depict specific geometric figures. For each textbook illustration, you are provided the SVG path data and a list of possible geometric shape options with lettered labels. To prevent costly publishing errors and maintain the integrity of educational materials, carefully analyze the path commands and select the correct geometric shape label from the provided options. Respond only with the letter corresponding to the correct geometric shape. Mistakes may result in the proliferation of incorrect learning materials, so proceed with the utmost precision.'
    text = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'IS_TYPE_UNDEFINED': True, '__dspy_field_type': 'input', 'prefix': 'Text:', 'desc': '${text}'})
    label = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'__dspy_field_type': 'output', 'prefix': 'Label:', 'desc': '${label}'})
))
